title: # [#modulatable_features]
content:
# [#modulatable_features]

## |[ MODULATABLE FEATURES — MASTER LIST v1.0 ]|
All current controllable features within your OS, ritual engine, and media pipeline.

| Feature | Type | Modulated By |
|----------------------------|-------------|-----------------------------------|
| Language Tone | Textual | LFO, Mood, Jessica |
| Narrative Logic | Structural | RNG, Recursive Mode |
| Color Palette | Visual | Mood, Moon Phase |
| UI Blur/Clarity | Visual | Reverb, Anxiety |
| Sound Texture | Audio | OSC Shape, Saturation |
| Response Delay | Temporal | Delay Module |
| Mood State | Emotional | RNG + Weather + AI |
| Memory Recall Volume | Narrative | Convolution, Envelope Follower |
